description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat and partially hipped roof, featuring a mix of white and light gray exterior walls. The structure includes a prominent garage with space for two cars, a driveway, and a landscaped front area with a small tree. The rear section has a fenced patio area with a gazebo-like covered space and outdoor seating, as well as a visible laundry drying rack. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light. The building is single-story, with a combination of open and enclosed spaces, and a clear separation between living and utility areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and functional outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat and hipped roof, large windows, a two-car garage, and a fenced patio with a gazebo and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two-car garage, driveway, and landscaped area with a small tree.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the fenced patio, gazebo, outdoor seating, and laundry rack, with the garage visible to the side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio fence, gazebo roof, and a mix of window placements along the building's length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main entrance, garage, and a clearer view of the patio and outdoor amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
